languages.text:
Cyber Eagle has +10 Agility and +100% Damage
Whenever Cyber Eagle dodges an attack from the enemy, this enemy loses 10% Dodge, Parry and Block

traits.locale_text:
Cyber Eagle has +10 Agility and +100% Damage
Whenever Cyber Eagle dodges an attack from the enemy, this enemy loses 10% Dodge, Parry and Block

languages.text:
The cyber-eagle gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and deals +100% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Whenever it {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} are reduced by −10%. Lasts until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
The cyber-eagle gains +10 Agility and deals +100% more damage.
Whenever it dodges an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and parry are reduced by −10%. Stacks and lasts until the end of combat.

Whenever it {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} are reduced by −10%. Lasts until the end of combat. Stacks.

Whenever it {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} are reduced by −10%. Lasts until the end of combat. Stacks.

languages.text:
Siber kartal, +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} niteliği kazanır ve +%100 daha fazla {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir.
Bir düşman saldırısından kaçındığında o düşmanın bloklama, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} değerleri %10 azalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.

Bir düşman saldırısından kaçındığında o düşmanın bloklama, kaçınma ve savuşturma değerleri %10 azalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.

Siber kartal, +10 Çeviklik niteliği kazanır ve +%100 daha fazla hasar verir.
Bir düşman saldırısından kaçındığında o düşmanın bloklama, kaçınma ve savuşturma değerleri %10 azalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.

languages.text:
La ciberáguila recibe +10 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} e inflige un +100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño adicional{/g}.
Cada vez que {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} un ataque enemigo, reduce en un −10 % el bloqueo, la esquiva y la {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parada{/g} de ese enemigo. Este efecto es acumulativo y dura hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text:

Whenever it {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} are reduced by −10%. Lasts until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
La ciberáguila recibe +10 de Agilidad e inflige un +100 % de daño adicional.
Cada vez que esquiva un ataque enemigo, reduce en un −10 % el bloqueo, la esquiva y la parada de ese enemigo. Este efecto es acumulativo y dura hasta el final del combate.

La ciberáguila recibe +10 de Agilidad e inflige un +100 % de daño adicional.
Cada vez que esquiva un ataque enemigo, reduce en un −10 % el bloqueo, la esquiva y la parada de ese enemigo. Este efecto es acumulativo y dura hasta el final del combate.

Cada vez que esquiva un ataque enemigo, reduce en un −10 % el bloqueo, la esquiva y la parada de ese enemigo. Este efecto es acumulativo y dura hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
生化猎鹰的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}提高10点，造成的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}提高100%。
每当生化猎鹰{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}敌人的攻击时，该名敌人的闪避、格挡、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}均降低10%。此效果可叠加，持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and deals +100% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Whenever it {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} are reduced by −10%. Lasts until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
生化猎鹰的敏捷提高10点，造成的伤害提高100%。
每当生化猎鹰闪避敌人的攻击时，该名敌人的闪避、格挡、招架均降低10%。此效果可叠加，持续至战斗结束。

languages.text:
Der Cyber-Adler erhält +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} und verursacht +100 % mehr {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}.
Wenn er dem Angriff eines Gegners {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweicht{/g}, werden Blocken, Ausweichen und {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}Parieren{/g} dieses Gegners um –10 % verringert. Hält bis zum Ende des Kampfes an. Stapelbar.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and deals +100% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Whenever it {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} are reduced by −10%. Lasts until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
Der Psitech-Adler erhält +10 Beweglichkeit und verursacht +100 % mehr Schaden.
Wenn er dem Angriff eines Gegners ausweicht, werden Blocken, Ausweichen und Parieren dieses Gegners um –10 % verringert. Hält bis zum Ende des Kampfes an. Stapelbar.

languages.text:
Le cyber-aigle reçoit un bonus d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} de +10 et inflige +100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} supplémentaires.
Chaque fois qu'il esquive l'attaque d'un ennemi, le blocage, l'{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parade{/g} de cet ennemi sont réduits de -10 %. Dure jusqu'à la fin du combat. Cumulable.
languages.original_text:
The cyber-eagle gains +10 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} and deals +100% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g}.
Whenever it {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} are reduced by −10%. Lasts until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
Le psyber-aigle reçoit un bonus d'Agilité de +10 et inflige +100 % de dégâts supplémentaires.
Chaque fois qu'il esquive l'attaque d'un ennemi, le blocage, l'esquive et la parade de cet ennemi sont réduits de -10 %. Dure jusqu'à la fin du combat. Cumulable.

languages.text:
サイバーイーグルの敏捷性が+10され、与えるダメージが+100%上昇する。
敵の攻撃を回避した場合、その敵のブロック、回避、受け流しが-10%低下する。戦闘終了まで継続する。この効果はスタックする。
languages.original_text:
The psyber-eagle gains +10 Agility and deals +100% more damage.
Whenever it dodges an enemy's attack, that enemy's block, dodge, and parry are reduced by −10%. Lasts until the end of combat. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
サイバーイーグルの敏捷性が+10され、与えるダメージが+100%上昇する。
敵の攻撃を回避した場合、その敵のブロック、回避、受け流しが-10%低下する。戦闘終了まで継続する。この効果はスタックする。

サイバーイーグルの敏捷性が+10され、与えるダメージが+100%上昇する。
敵の攻撃を回避した場合、その敵のブロック、回避、受け流しが-10%低下する。戦闘終了まで継続する。この効果はスタックする。

languages.text:
Киберорел получает +10 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} и +100% к наносимому {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урону{/g}.
Когда он {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняется{/g} от вражеской атаки, блок, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирование{/g} и уклонение атаковавшего уменьшаются на 10%. Суммируется и длится до конца боя.

Когда он уклоняется от вражеской атаки, блок, парирование и уклонение атаковавшего уменьшаются на 10%. Суммируется и длится до конца боя.
